Pride and Prejudice

by Jane Austen

subjects: Classic Fiction, Romance

Description

Elizabeth Bennet is Austen's most liberated and unambiguously appealing heroine.

486 pages with a reading time of ~7.50 hours (121562 words), and first published in 1813. This DRM-Free edition published by epubBooks, 2009.
